stars.fact: Katherine's birthday is in March
Anniversary is the second week of June
Family movie night is Friday evenings
Dog's name is Scout, a golden retriever
Backup emergency contact is his brother
Prefers window seats on flights
Prefers flights that avoid Atlanta layovers
Home base is Cary, North Carolina
Drives a blue Honda CR-V
Coffee order: flat white, extra shot
Likes dark roast, no sugar, splash of oat milk at home
Favorite restaurant is the little Italian place downtown
Allergic to shellfish
The kids' soccer practice is Tuesdays and Thursdays
Son plays travel baseball on weekends
Daughter's favorite color is purple
Wants a heads-up before any calendar double-booking
Dentist appointments are every six months in the fall
Keeps a running list of home improvement projects
Prefers texting over phone calls for quick things
